Utilities.NuTauPeakShapes module

Functions commonly used for likelihood analysis

Utilities.OpticalParameters module

Utilities.PandelPDFs module

A single place to keep all PDFs that have been coded in the process of attempting to create a muon track reconstruction for P-ONE.

Utilities.PandelPDFs.cpandel(t, d, sigma, lambda_s, rho)
Utilities.PandelPDFs.gaussWindow(xData, yData, stdDev)
Utilities.PandelPDFs.log_cpandel(t, d, sigma=10, lambda_s=120.0, rho=0.004)
Utilities.PandelPDFs.mod_logcpandel(t, d, sigma=10.0, lambda_s=120.0, rho=0.004)
Utilities.PandelPDFs.pandel(t, d, lambda_a=15.0, lambda_s=120.0, tau=5.57e-07)
Utilities.PandelPDFs.pandel2(t, d, lambda_s=120.0, rho=0.004)
